title: Aaron Rich’s CV
text:
Aspiring Computer Science Student, Backend Developer, C# & SQL Enthusiast.

richnumbers@gmail.com | GitHub  | Download PDF



Building backend systems and data-driven applications as a Computer Science student at BYU-Idaho.


Backend development with C#, relational database design, and custom engine architecture.



Data structures, game systems, system architecture, data analysis, and scalable software design.




April 2027 Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, Idaho

Computer Science
Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Software Engineering, Database Design, Programming with Classes




Card Game Engine (C#)

Designed and implemented a relational database to manage cards, items, and characters, enabling reliable battle logic and deck validation.
Integrated inventory, combat, and deck systems within a custom C# engine, ensuring accurate game-state synchronization without third-party frameworks.

Firebase & SQLite Data Analysis

Built a Firebase database and populated a SQLite database from cloud data, creating visual data points and charts to analyze usage patterns and system behavior.




April 2024 - Present Pierc Pitt BBQ, Williamsburg, Virginia — Kitchen Staff

Prepared 300–400 meals per shift (up to 600 on peak days) while maintaining quality and sub-8-minute ticket times.
Maintained consistent food rotation and safety standards during high-volume hours.

September 2019 - March 2024 Walmart, Williamsburg, Virginia — Team Lead, Service Writer

Delivered front-line customer service processing transactions including money orders and check cashing, contributing to a 90% customer satisfaction rating.
Coordinated front-end teams of up to 20 associates per shift, reducing wait times by ~30% during peak hours.
Wrote 15+ daily service orders and advised customers, contributing to a 20% increase in upsold maintenance services.
Performed ~700 automotive services including oil changes, tire work, and battery installs.






C#, Python, MySQL, SQLite, JSON, Firebase



Leadership, Customer Service, Retail Operations, Automotive Maintenance, Cash Handling
